title: QuestQCPR
description: This was my final year project
description2: The goal of creating this app was to provide in-depth CPR training using an augmented reality overlay. It features menus, instructions, and guides on performing CPR. Only available on the Meta Quest 3 as it was developed on Meta's SDK.

title: Bookie
description: This was my third year final project.
description2: This was my 3rd year final project where I designed the Back-End for a book trading website. Created CRUD functionality for book-trading, real-time chatting, forum posting, friend requests, and wishlisting.

title: Medical API
description: This was my second hosted React application.
description2: This was simple Front-End I built for a practice hospital database. Features CRUD functionality and privacy depending on the users role.

title: Emotion CNN
description: Created a CNN to detect emotions
description2: Developed a CNN built to detect the users emotions based on what their camera detects. Used a popular kaggle database called FER2013 for this.

title: Crime prediction
description: Trained a model to predict NYC Crime statistics
description2: Trained and tested a CNN to analyse publicly available information (NYC.gov) to create a trend in crime statistics and predict what the next years value would be. Repeated for unemployment rates and made comparisons.

title: Country API
description: This was my first hosted React application.
description2: For my first react application, I created a basic search engine for a country index API and created "sort by" functionality.

title: Portfolio Site
description: This is the third redesign of my portfolio
description2: Third (and probably not final) attempt at creating a portfolio to host my project showcase. Features basic front-end design techniques like relying heavily on images, random unused CSS classes etc.
